description_long: This object is a pair of long, straight-bladed swords with squared tips and a robust, utilitarian design. The blades are broad and flat, with one side appearing metallic gray and the other a darker, almost black finish, suggesting different materials or coatings. The handles are cylindrical and slightly contoured, made of a wood-like material with a rounded pommel and a small, circular guard at the base of the blade. The guard is simple and functional, providing minimal hand protection. The overall construction is solid and practical, with no visible ornamentation or decorative features. These swords are reminiscent of training or practice weapons, possibly inspired by medieval or fantasy designs.
description: A pair of long, straight-bladed swords with squared tips, simple guards, and contoured wooden handles. The blades have contrasting metallic and dark finishes, with a robust, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Two swords side by side, showing the broad, flat faces of the blades and the full length of the contoured handles.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blades and the circular cross-section of the guards and pommels.
description_view_2: Reverse angle of the swords, displaying the contrasting blade finishes and the symmetry of the handles.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the straightness and length of the blades.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, contoured, wood-like with rounded pommel
